global.description: The ad features a food delivery service with a vibrant orange background and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.description: A simple illustration of two food items displayed in a rectangular frame, suggesting a food delivery service.

elements.label: Delivery message

elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in white against an orange background, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' is displayed in a bold font at the top, colored in a contrasting shade to stand out.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small white label with the text 'UGC' in the top corner, suggesting user-generated content.
